meaning: n.铸工,翻沙工,创始人,奠基人vt.使沉没,使摔倒,弄跛,浸水,破坏vi.沉没,摔到,变跛,倒塌,失败 方正集团,中国最著名的电子照排系统的生产商
examples: Its founder Rodolphe Julian was a canny businessman.
The founder became paralyzed in a paragliding accident.
Now, many people consider John Watson to be the founder of behaviorism.
So why does Guccione, the founder of SPIN and Gear, plan to reenter publishing this year?
Now, we have some comments by BET founder Bob Johnson that have reignited the flames.
